# Guide recommendation
[info] Intent: security review for auth flow
[info] Context: terminal
[info] Primary alias: /supercodex:security
[info] Target: run.review
[info] Why: Keyword overlap detected.
[info] Default mode: safe
[info] Default persona: reviewer
[info] Core loop step: security_scan
[info] Core objective: Perform security-focused review.
[info] Use one of these forms:
- supercodex security
- supercodex /supercodex:security
- /prompts:supercodex-review
-> Best next command now: supercodex security
-> Then continue with:
-> supercodex review
-> supercodex perf
-> Core loop commands:
-> supercodex spec
-> supercodex implement
-> supercodex test
-> supercodex review
-> supercodex refactor
-> supercodex document
[info] Alternatives:
[info] /supercodex:review -> run.review (score: 36)
[info] /supercodex:perf -> run.review (score: 30)
